detail: Monthly regional detrended, deseasonalized, standardized MODIS NDVI and ERA5-Land climate anomalies, 2001-2025.
A positive lag L correlates NDVI at month t with climate at month t-L; climate therefore precedes NDVI.
Pearson correlation p values use an effective sample size estimated from lag-1 autocorrelation in each paired series.
Benjamini-Hochberg adjustment is applied across 21 tests (3 variables by 7 lags).
